creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
There is a compatibility issue between py-salt v3006.8 and py-pygit2 v1.15.0 (and newer) that affects the gitfs file client.

The issue is documented here: https://github.com/saltstack/salt/issues/66590
...and fixed here: https://github.com/saltstack/salt/pull/66743

This fix is present in py-salt v3006.9, so I am requesting that the maintainer update the port to this version.

Thank you!
